title: Mouthwatering Norwegian Cod Curry
description: A salty, chewy crowd-pleaser that blends Norwegian cod with orange zest and fermented kimchi for a tangy, satisfying curry.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, grated ginger, and red curry paste; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Mix in tomato paste, then pour in coconut milk and warm water, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, then add the chopped kimchi and soy sauce, letting it cook for 5 minutes.
Gently fold in the cod cubes, cover, and simmer for 8 minutes until the fish is opaque and flaky.
Stir in fresh orange zest, adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste, and remove from heat.
Serve hot over steamed rice or with flatbread, garnishing with sliced green onions if desired.
